api: UserVoice Admin API v2 (https://<subdomain>.uservoice.com/api/v2, per the real OpenAPI reference at uservoice.uservoice.com/api/v2/public/doc/api-v2-reference)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against UserVoice's real, currently-published Admin API v2 OpenAPI spec (185 endpoint+method combinations across 133 paths). The original legacy-parity suggestions stream targets /api/v2/suggestions (no /admin/ segment) verbatim for accepted-input parity; every other endpoint below is the real /api/v2/admin/... surface. 8 new read streams and 8 new write actions cover the practical core of feedback-management data (forums/users/categories/statuses/labels/comments/notes/teams, plus suggestion and comment/label/note lifecycle writes). The remainder is excluded across account-administration (permissions/teams-assignment/subdomains/user-block), UI/presentation configuration (themes/views/translatable_strings), analytics/reporting (impact_reports/segments/importance_scores/suggestion_activity_entries), integration bookkeeping (external_accounts/external_users/feedback_connector_configurations), bulk-only operations with no single-record shape (import/batch/bulk_delete/merge/link), and single-object detail endpoints duplicating an already-covered list stream's record shape.
